positive: Minimalist and whimsical celestial map featuring a stylized crescent moon and scattered constellations. The design incorporates abstract geometric linework connecting simple, illustrative star shapes and floating nebula elements. Use deep indigo and cosmic violet as the primary background colors, contrasted by bright, ethereal gold and cyan outlines. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centered, creating a clean, bold silhouette suitable for large-scale print. Highly detailed vector style, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: blur, text, watermark, low resolution, out of frame, noisy, grunge, photo, realistic, signature, logo, text, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, extra fingers
